prompt:
A small outdoor scene showing a person’s lower legs and boots beside a compact digital ground-temperature probe inserted into a patch of soil or lawn, with a cable running to a handheld meter displaying a simple temperature gauge icon instead of readable numbers. Nearby, a shallow test hole or auger core is visible, suggesting that the ground at a certain depth is being evaluated for geothermal suitability. The background hints at a residential yard or field with subtle renewable-energy cues like distant solar panels.

Near-future solarpunk outdoor aesthetic with soft, natural daylight and realistic vegetation. Photorealistic 512×512 image with no brand logos or legible text on the meter; the interface relies on icons and a clear temperature bar. The composition should make it obvious that the quest involves measuring ground temperature to check if a heat pump will work.
